mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sms_verification_code(phone, code, type, expired_at, used, created_at) VALUES(#{phone}, #{code}, #{type}, #{expiredAt}, #{used}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sms_verification_code WHERE phone = #{phone} AND type = #{type} AND used = FALSE AND expired_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
